category_sources: Official skarnet page describes s6 as a UNIX process and service supervision suite.
source_facts.description says it is a small and secure supervision software suite.
display_name_sources: Official skarnet documentation page title is s6.
docs_sources: Official skarnet s6 page states the documentation is complete and self-contained and lists command reference pages.
repo_sources: Official cgit page provides clone URLs for the skarnet s6 repository.
Official skarnet download section links the s6 git repository.
tags_sources: Official skarnet page describes supervision, daemon management, logging, readiness notification, and socket activation utilities.
